footer_cop: Almouyassar Play & Learn • Ñel Daara Al-Mouyassar.
footer_desc: Liguéyal fas yéné yombal njàngum Alqouran ak xamxamu Diiné (Akhlaq & Tahji)
empty_trophies: Amu guo bén néer foleg. Jangal rek !
quiz_search_placeholder: Hadith, julli, sellal, yéné, ci yeneen...
timer_desc: Tek waxtu ngir yok bej-bej bi
oustaz_welcome: Assalamou alaykoum, sama doom bou rafet ! Masha'Allah, contane naa lool ci giss gua fii. Man may Oustaz bou virtuel bou Daara Al-Mouyassar. Laajal ma lëpp lou la neex ci diiné islam, julli, Alquran, téguine (Akhlaq) walla dundug daara bi, dina la tontu ci anam bou am yërmande te yomb a dégg. Lan nga beug jang tay ?
oustaz_placeholder: Laajal Oustaz bi ab laaj... (ex: Lan moy julli ?)
oustaz_thinking: Oustaz bi mi ngi xalat ci anam bou neex te am yërmande
oustaz_recommended: Laaj yu gnu tann ngir yaw :
oustaz_subtitle: Ku neex baat, am yërmande tey jangalé
oustaz_no_chats: Amu guo bén waxtaan bou gnu fi denc.
oustaz_click_chat: Bësal fii ngir reprendre ab waxtaan walla ngir tambali bu bees.
oustaz_confirm_delete: Woor na la ni beug nga dindi waxtaan bi ci sa history ?
oustaz_confirm_clear: Danga beug dellu waxtaan bi guinaw te tambali waxtaan bu bees ?
oustaz_suggested_1_q: Lan moy Akhlaq (téguine) te lutax mu am solo lool ci dundug joulit ?
oustaz_suggested_2_q: Mën nga ma firi lan moy étape u Tahji ci Daara Al-Mouyassar ?
oustaz_suggested_3_q: Naka la gniy amé Sabr (mounou) bou may jang sama leçon yi ?
oustaz_suggested_4_q: Kan moy Cheikh El Hadji Abdallah Niasse te naka la taxawalé Daara Al-Mouyassar ?
